# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

I reviewed the current working-tree diff end-to-end. The only modified files are `.ralph-burning/projects/9ni911-1/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/9ni911-1/run.json` (diff lines in this range), and these are explicitly excluded from review scope. No non-scope implementation files changed, so I found no reviewable correctness/safety/robustness defects in milestone command handler code for this change set.

## Amendments

None.
